.canvas-card-menu.background: rgb(245, 245, 245) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.metadata-property-key.font-family: "??", "??", "JetBrains Mono", monospace, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

.metadata-property-value.font-family: "??", "??", "JetBrains Mono", monospace, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

.status-bar.background: rgb(226, 226, 226) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(245, 245, 245) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #f5f5f5 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#f5f5f5, color-mix(in srgb, #f5f5f5 65%, transparent))
body.--file-header-font: '??', '??', "JetBrains Mono", monospace, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", "Inter", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif
body.--font-interface: '??', '??', "JetBrains Mono", monospace, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", "Inter", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif
body.--metadata-input-font: '??', '??', "JetBrains Mono", monospace, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", "Inter", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif
body.--metadata-label-font: '??', '??', "JetBrains Mono", monospace, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", "Inter", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #f5f5f5 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#f5f5f5, color-mix(in srgb, #f5f5f5 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(245, 245, 245) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
body.font-family: "??", "??", "JetBrains Mono", monospace, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(245, 245, 245) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
body.styled-scrollbars.font-family: "??", "??", "JetBrains Mono", monospace, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(245, 245, 245) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(226, 226, 226) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(226, 226, 226) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(245, 245, 245) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(226, 226, 226) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

hr.background: rgb(226, 226, 226) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

hr.workspace-leaf-resize-handle.background: rgb(226, 226, 226) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(222, 165, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(245, 245, 245) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"text\"].font-family: "??", "??", "JetBrains Mono", monospace, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

mark.background: rgb(233, 179, 95) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(even).background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.204) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
